description: Read-only CLI for Digg — the AI story leaderboard, GitHub feeds, and ingestion pipeline events on digg.com.

novel_features.name: Live pipeline event tail
novel_features.description: Tail Digg's ingestion pipeline in real time — see clusters as they're detected, stories fast-climbing the leaderboard with explicit rank deltas, X posts being processed, batch breakdowns.

novel_features.name: Replacement archaeology
novel_features.description: Show stories that were knocked out of the rankings since the last sync, with Digg's own published replacement rationale.

novel_features.name: Score component breakdown
novel_features.description: Print the full ranking transparency record for one cluster — scoreComponents, evidence array, numeratorLabel, percentAboveAverage.

novel_features.name: Time-windowed sentiment
novel_features.description: Read per-time-window positivity ratios (pos6h, pos12h, pos24h, posLast) for a cluster.

novel_features.name: Cross-aggregator references
novel_features.description: Show this cluster's Hacker News and Techmeme mirrors when Digg has detected the story is being discussed there.

novel_features.name: Influence-ranked author leaderboard
novel_features.description: Top accounts Digg tracks, ranked by Digg's influence score, story count, or reach.

novel_features.name: GitHub: top starred AI repos
novel_features.description: Top AI repos ranked by starring activity from Digg-tracked accounts: stargazers, recent starrers, breakout/novel/ai_related scores, language, one-sentence classification.

novel_features.name: GitHub: newly first-seen repos
novel_features.description: Recently first-seen GitHub repos with the Digg-tracked creator/starrer who first put them on Digg's radar (event_id, event_created_at, repo_full_name, creator).

novel_features.name: GitHub: contributor leaderboard
novel_features.description: Top GitHub contributor leaderboard: per-author rank, contribution count, and distinct repos count over Digg's tracking window.

novel_features.name: GitHub: live activity feed
novel_features.description: Live GitHub activity feed: per-event entries with the GitHub URL (issue/PR/commit/repo), the user who acted, and a short description of the target.

novel_features.name: Rank history per cluster
novel_features.description: Full trajectory of one cluster's currentRank, peakRank, and delta over local snapshot history.

novel_features.name: Author surfacing record
novel_features.description: Every cluster a given X account contributed to, with post type (original, retweet, quote, reply).

novel_features.name: Rank-movement watcher
novel_features.description: Poll /ai, diff against last snapshot, alert when any cluster moves N+ ranks.

novel_features.name: Pipeline status dashboard
novel_features.description: One-screen view of /api/trending/status: isFetching, nextFetchAt, storiesToday, clustersToday, last 5 events.
